title: Task packet compiler hardening
objective: Generate task packets from backlog and verification-map instead of only using a static example task.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Add a CLI command or bootstrap step that creates .harness/tasks/*.task.json from backlog.items.json.
Task packet includes objective, editableScope, forbiddenScope, acceptanceCriteria, verifyCommands, budgets, expectedArtifacts.
Invalid or missing acceptance criteria fail with clear error.
Smoke test updated to use generated task where appropriate.

koObjective: backlog/issue/planning 산출물을 검증 가능한 task-packet.json으로 컴파일한다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
